name: JT (the JessTrading Candle)
visual_description:
3D Pixar-style mascot character. The body is a tall rectangular green
trading candle (saturated green #00C853) with thin black wicks on top
and bottom. The character has a friendly cartoon face on the front of
the candle: large round expressive eyes and a small mouth that
animates with speech. The character has short chubby Pixar-style arms
emerging from the sides (with rounded white cartoon hands) and short
stubby legs at the bottom (with rounded white cartoon shoes), Funko
Pop proportions. Soft warm Pixar-style lighting, subtle rim light,
gentle drop shadow. Clean and stylized like a Pixar short film
character.
